## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and related context.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Performance improvement

## Changes Made

- What specific changes were made?
- Why were these changes necessary?
- How do these changes improve the codebase?

## Testing

- [ ] I have tested these changes locally
- [ ] I have added tests for new functionality
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] Code passes linting (`flake8 code/ tests/`)
- [ ] Code passes type checking (`mypy code/`)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows PEP 8 style guidelines
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation
- [ ] I have added/updated docstrings
- [ ] I have updated CHANGELOG.md
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have removed any unnecessary comments or code

## Code Quality

- Code style: `black code/ --check`
- Linting: `flake8 code/ tests/`
- Type checking: `mypy code/`
- Tests: `pytest tests/ -v --cov`

## Performance Impact

- Do these changes affect performance?
- Have you measured the impact?
- Are there any trade-offs?

## Dependencies

- Do these changes add any new dependencies?
- Are all dependencies in requirements.txt?

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Include any relevant screenshots or output.

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the PR here.

## Related Issues

- Closes #(issue number)
- Related to #(issue number)

## Reviewers

@mention relevant reviewers or maintainers
